title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 9 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 9 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 9 2026
summary:
Main
Today, the DCE iron ore futures trended weak today, with contract 12609 closing at 745.5 yuan/mt, up 0.27% from the previous trading day.Port spot prices ranged from -2 to +3 yuan/mt compared with the previous trading day. Trader activity was moderate, steel mills made few inquiries, and of now, spot transaction volumes were low. According to the SMM survey, total inventory at the 10 main ports stood at 108.14 million mt, down 1.32 million mt MoM.
